{{CargoRelic
|name=Ouroboros Mark
|class_id=22056
|rank=Blue
|affct=FAITH
|birthday=01-16
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.26%), Wishing (0.14%)
|description=On Jan 16, 417 BC, Plato first proposed the concept of the ouroboros in his vision of the universal sphere.<br>This ancient mythological mark takes the form of a ring, resembling the infinity symbol, and holds multiple interpretations including infinity, cycle, and rebirth. It holds significance not only in religion and mythology, but also in alchemy, mathematics, physics, and psychology.
|fame=24
|art=31
|fth=44
|civ=20
|tech=35
|ss1=Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +6m
|ss2=Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +12m
|ss3=Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +18m
|ss4=Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +30m
|ss7=Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +30m<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +30m (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Arena skill I.png|50px]]Place in Snail Arena Compass: In Snail Arena, Snail ATK +20
}}
